falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key trendline would invalidate the bottom pattern and suggest a bullish reversal, contradicting the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the current HOLD and suggesting a top rather than a bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Non-Farm Payrolls report shows a figure of 300K or higher, leading to a 5% surge in the Nasdaq 100 within 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a strong economic data-driven rally would invalidate the current HOLD by demonstrating a clear bullish breakout inconsistent with the bottom pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
